name_cn:
🆕 【 MB Chip Version Original Leather】
 This OnTheGo East West Handbag is crafted in calfskin to create a slender silhouette, featuring a perforated effect that creates an optical illusion of the Monogram pattern.
Model: M11274 Pink Dynamic Chip Version
Material: Grade A full steel hardware, imported original fabric
Packaging: Full set of original tax-free MB packaging
Dimensions: 25*13*10CM
